The Tallahassee Democrat stories online

March/April 2001
Investigative MethodsGovernment & Politics

The Tallahassee Democrat published investigative pieces examining potential links between voter income levels and discarded ballots, as well as analyzing legal funding sources in the 2000 presidential election dispute. These stories are available online and can be ordered through the IRE Resource Center.

The Tallahassee Democrat's "Incomes, discarded votes may be linked" is available online at http://web.tallahasseedemocrat.com/content/tallahassee/2000/12/03/local/1203.loc.votes.htm

"Bush wins battle for legal funds" is also available online at http://web.tallahasseedemocrat.com/content/tallahassee/2000/12/18/local/1218.loc.contribs.htm

These stories will soon be available from the IRE Resource Center. Search the story database at www.ire.org/resourcecenter for order numbers. Call (573) 882-3364 to order these and other investigative stories.
